locations.name: 昆拉德·雅各布·特明克
locations.summary: 昆拉德·雅各布·特明克（荷蘭語：Coenraad Jacob Temminck，1778年3月31日—1858年1月30日）是一名荷蘭貴族和動物學家。 生平 特明克於阿姆斯特丹出生，1820年出任位於萊頓的國家自然歷史博物館，直至去世。他…

locations.name: 蘇門答臘島
locations.summary: 蘇門答臘島（印尼語：Sumatra）是印尼最西面的一個大島，也是全球第六大島嶼，全島面積達47萬平方公里，人口58,455,800人（2019年）。 地理 蘇門答臘島呈西北—東南走向，在中間與赤道相交叉，由兩個地區组成：西部巴里散山脈和東…

locations.name: 爪哇岛
locations.summary: 爪哇島（印尼語：Jawa；爪哇語：ꦗꦮ；巽他語：ᮏᮝ；英語：Java），粵語早期譯为渣华，位於印度尼西亚，南临印度洋，北面爪哇海。 爪哇岛是印尼的核心大岛，全島面積138,800平方公里，是印尼第五大島，亦是印尼人口最多、世界人口最多的島…

relations.subject: Sumatran green pigeon
relations.evidence: First described by the Dutch zoologist Coenraad Jacob Temminck in 1823, it is endemic to Indonesia, where it is found in Sumatra and western Java

relations.subject: Sumatran green pigeon

relations.subject: Sumatran green pigeon
relations.evidence: First described by the Dutch zoologist Coenraad Jacob Temminck in 1823, it is endemic to Indonesia, where it is found in Sumatra and western Java

relations.subject: Sumatran green pigeon
relations.evidence: On Sumatra, it is found in the Barisan Mountains, as well as some other parts of the island, while on Java, it is found in the western mountains east to Mount Papandayan

relations.subject: Sumatran green pigeon
relations.evidence: It inhabits the canopy of dense hill and montane forest and has been recorded at elevations of on Sumatra and on Java
relations.object_summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

relations.subject: Sumatran green pigeon
relations.evidence: The Sumatran green pigeon is listed as near-threatened on the IUCN Red List due to a "moderately small" population that is continuing to decline because of habitat degradation
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: Sumatran green pigeon
relations.evidence: Forest loss due to logging and fires has been extensive in the pigeon's range, especially at lower elevations, leading to a patchy distribution
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。
